title: Insert an Oban job with a specific schedule_at
prompt: Write `MyApp.Reminders.schedule_for/2` that takes a `user_id` and a `%DateTime{}` and enqueues `MyApp.Workers.ReminderWorker` to run at exactly that DateTime using `scheduled_at:` (not `schedule_in:`). Use string-keyed args `%{"user_id" => user_id}`. Return the insert result. Write to `lib/my_app/reminders.ex`.
tier_rationale: Standard Oban scheduling alternative to schedule_in; recognises that absolute datetime → scheduled_at, not cron.
